tweets.content: Think so. But in the meantime, I call my strategy: Diversified Losses. With $AXTI, $SOI, $AAOI, and many others. Had a massive drawdown recently, CPO exposure was hit the hardest (Foci, Msscorp, etc) and adjacent names, feels bad. Probably lesson personally, I had too much concentration in photonics vs. memory/other sectors without weighting/hedging properly. With Soitec, there's been a few negative institutional reports that I'd disagree with. Think AXT was hit harder in specific just because of float expansion/dilution concerns. AAOI, probably just brought down with the theme. I can't give advice on buying, so completely up to you to make for cost averaging or entering positions. But I do think we're still early in the Supercycle with photonics, there's bound to be corrections/crashes along the way up. If my personal thesis is correct though, many of these names will have a major inflection point in midway through 2027 scaling up to 2028. Markets don't typically wait to price things in advance, but some ideas might be a tad early or in the buildout given it's H2 2026 now. Which is why it's important to build your own conviction.
tweets.translated: 这么想吧。但与此同时，我将我的策略称为：多元化损失。包括 $AXTI、$SOI、$AAOI 等等。最近经历了大规模的缩编，CPO 的暴露受到了最严重的打击（Foci、Msscorp 等）和邻近的名字，感觉很糟糕。可能是我个人的教训，我过于专注于光子学与内存/其他领域，而没有适当地加权/对冲。对于 Soitec，有一些我不同意的负面机构报告。认为 AXT 受到的打击尤其严重，只是因为浮动膨胀/稀释问题。 AAOI，可能只是随着主题而下降。我无法提供购买建议，因此完全取决于您来进行成本平均或建仓。但我确实认为我们仍处于光子学超级周期的早期阶段，一路上肯定会出现修正/崩溃。如果我的个人观点是正确的，那么其中许多名字将在 2027 年中期出现一个重大拐点，一直到 2028 年。市场通常不会等待提前定价，但鉴于现在是 2026 年下半年，有些想法可能有点早或正在扩展中。这就是为什么建立自己的信念很重要。

tweets.content: Today, Anthropic has directly accused the $BABA Qwen AI lab of distilling its frontier AI models. By creating thousands of fake accounts and over 28.8 million exchanges. Feels like this is kind of known by now... but there's been no real penalties enforced yet. We'll see what happens.
tweets.translated: 如今，Anthropic 直接指责 $BABA Qwen AI 实验室提炼其前沿 AI 模型。通过创建数千个虚假账户和超过 2880 万个交易所。感觉现在已经知道了……但还没有执行真正的处罚。我们会看看会发生什么。

tweets.content: Always amazing looking at $MU earnings: Revenue: $41.46B vs. $35.8B est. EPS: $25.11 vs. $20.78 est. Forecasts: Revenue: $49B to $51B, vs $43.24B est EPS: $30.00 to $32.00, vs. $25.31. “Micron said on Wednesday that it has signed 16 long-term agreements” "When completed, we expect approximately half or more of our company revenue to be under these" Looks like memory demand has become structural… But great earnings to show up the AI trade is continuing to ramp up.
tweets.translated: $MU 收益总是令人惊叹：收入：$41.46B 对比 $35.8B 预计每股收益：$25.11 对比 $20.78 预计每股收益 预测：收入：$49B 至 $51B 对比 $43.24B 预计每股收益：$30.00 至 $32.00 对比 $25.31。 “美光周三表示，它已经签署了 16 项长期协议”“完成后，我们预计我们公司收入的大约一半或更多将来自这些” 看起来内存需求已经成为结构性的......但显示人工智能行业的巨大收益正在继续增长。
